import json


def prepare_for_storage(data: dict) -> bytes:
    return json.dumps(data).encode("utf-8")


def parse_from_storage(raw: bytes) -> dict:
    return json.loads(raw.decode("utf-8"))


def save_user_profile(profile: dict, storage) -> None:
    serialized = prepare_for_storage(profile)
    storage.write(serialized)


def load_user_profile(storage, user_id: str) -> dict:
    raw = storage.read(user_id)
    return parse_from_storage(raw)


def transfer_profile(source_storage, dest_storage, user_id: str) -> None:
    raw = source_storage.read(user_id)
    profile = parse_from_storage(raw)
    profile["migrated"] = True
    serialized = prepare_for_storage(profile)
    dest_storage.write(user_id, serialized)
